CVE-2022-2211.title: A vulnerability was found in libguestfs. This issue occurs while  ...
CVE-2022-2211.description: A vulnerability was found in libguestfs. This issue occurs while calculating the greatest possible number of matching keys in the get_keys() function. This flaw leads to a denial of service, either by mistake or malicious actor.
